name: stop: an opted-out guest messaging later gets the opt-out status once, not the marketing greeting (B14/F24)
comment: Behaviour 4: a later 'hi' from an opted-out guest in NEW does NOT trigger the greeting (optional/marketing) — it returns the opt-out status and how to opt back in, and writes nothing (no guest record update to AWAITING_DETAILS). The greeting being suppressed and replaced by the pointer is the proof optional messaging is dead.
